turns.name: Target reboot on AD0
turns.user: Can you find out why AD0 rebooted recently and when exactly?

turns.name: Confirm evidence IDs
turns.user: Please confirm with reboot/shutdown evidence IDs (1074, 6008, 41, 6005, 6006) and give UTC timestamps.

turns.name: Classify reboot type
turns.user: Classify whether that reboot was planned vs unexpected and explain briefly.

turns.name: Expand lookback
turns.user: If the recent slice is truncated, query a broader System log window and restate the exact reboot marker.

turns.name: Discover peer DCs
turns.user: Discover other DCs in this domain and list their hostnames.

turns.name: Cross-check peer DCs
turns.user: Check those DCs for the same reboot signature around AD0's window and return a side-by-side matrix.

turns.name: Pattern signal
turns.user: Tell me whether the pattern looks host-local or shared infra/update wave.

turns.name: Top likely causes
turns.user: Give top likely root-cause categories for AD0 with confidence levels.

turns.name: Action plan
turns.user: Give a prioritized next-action checklist to validate root cause in under 30 minutes.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final findings in 6 bullets with exact UTC times and key evidence IDs.
